summary: VERDICT: YES-WITH-EXTENSION. [plausible] Every surveyed UFO construct is representable using RDF 1.2 quoted triples/reifiers, N3 formulae, OWL vocabulary, and SHACL shapes. [well-established] The required extension is UFO-SN3: a finite, situation-scoped, range-restricted N3/Datalog profile over OWL-RL. title: UFO in RDF 1.2: Expressibility Verdict and SPARQ Reference-Implementation Plan
